title: ‘Exclusion compounds’: Women in tech push to shape AI before it’s too late
summary: Speakers at the Women in Tech Regatta in Seattle said AI is at risk of repeating longstanding patterns of exclusion, from biased hiring tools to gaps in who's shaping AI strategy. Read More
author: Sydney Jackson
